params.name: Double Helix DNA
params.source:
* Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wishing (0.07%)
* Research Value Pack III ($99.99)
params.description:
On July 13, 2015, a Double Helix model was presented to the world for the first time.

In Science and Technology magazine, a twisted double-helix structure model formed by various materials was revealed for the first time. It is one of the four significant scientific discoveries of the 20th century, which has enabled the study pf heredity to advance to the molecular level. The world was getting close to the answers to the mysteries of life. People then had a clearer understanding of the structur …
